reviews.comment:
Excelente camping. No es lo mas económico pero sus instalaciones están siempre en buenas condiciones, baños 10 puntos, muy recomendable.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent campsite. It's not the cheapest, but the facilities are always in good condition, the bathrooms are top-notch, highly recommended.
